leagueBriefing: Round 4 delivered major storyline shifts, from Scotland's 50-40 thriller over France to Italy's historic win over England and emotional post-match fallout.

games.headline: Sensational Scots dent French title hopes in 90-point thriller
games.brief: Scotland produced one of the performances of the championship, racing out to a huge lead before surviving a furious late French rally in Edinburgh.
bullets: Scotland beat France 50-40 in a Round 4 classic at Murrayfield.
The hosts led 19-14 at halftime before exploding in the second half.
Scotland reached 50 points for the first time in this fixture.
France's late surge recovered two bonus points but could not close the gap.
games.context: The result blew open the title race heading into the final round.

highlights.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Round 4 | Scotland v France | A 90-point thriller that shakes up the standing!

games.headline: A victory for everyone who has ever worn this jersey
games.brief: Italy reflected on a historic result against England, with coach Gonzalo Quesada and key players emphasizing composure, bench impact, and the significance of the win for Italian rugby.
bullets: The piece captures post-match reaction after Italy's landmark victory over England.
Quesada highlighted game-management and mental control in tense moments.
Italy legend Diego Dominguez praised the squad's unity and progress.
Attention now turns to a potential three-win campaign finish on Super Saturday.
games.context: Published the day after the win, the feature frames the result as a milestone moment for Italy in the championship.
